title: Comforting Citrus Filipino Noodles Pancit Bihon
description: A Filipino dish featuring golden syrup and stir-fry, this recipe is an earthy and energizing take on the traditional pancit bihon, made with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients and cooked to a glassy-jelly perfection on a raclette grill.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat on the raclette grill.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the rice noodles and stir-fry for about 2 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the golden syrup, soy sauce, and calamansi juice, and stir-fry for another 2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated.
Add the turmeric and stir-fry for another minute, until well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pancit bihon to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of turmeric.
